steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The list is 20, 19, 23, 22, $x$. The sum of the known values is $20 + 19 + 23 + 22 = 84$, so mean $= \frac{84 + x}{5}$. The median is the 3rd value when all five numbers are in order. Test each choice to see which makes mean $\neq$ median.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content: Test choice A, 11: if $x = 11$, the mean is $\frac{84+11}{5}=19$. Ordered, the list is $11,19,20,22,23$, so the median is $20$. Since the mean and median are not equal, $x = 11$ is not possible.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content:
• A: mean $19$, median $20$ — not equal, so this is the value that is not possible.
  • B: mean $20$, median $20$ — possible.
  • C: mean $21$, median $21$ — possible.
  • D: mean $22$, median $22$ — possible.
That is the correct answer.
